allow: Bash(rm -f about.html auth.html best-practices.html changelog.html create-path.html create-roadmap.html forgot-password.html frontend-roadmap.html guide-detail.html guides.html path.html path-detail.html privacy.html roadmap.html roadmap-detail.html terms.html test-buttons.html video-detail.html videos.html server.js shared.js test-all-buttons.sh ALL_PAGES.md BUTTONS.md BUTTONS_STATUS.txt DESIGN_SYSTEM.md QUICK_START.txt TESTING.md server.log)

hooks.command: $s = git -C 'C:\Users\danys\MyGithubRepos\fitpath' status --porcelain; if ($s) { git -C 'C:\Users\danys\MyGithubRepos\fitpath' config user.email 'danysued@gmail.com'; git -C 'C:\Users\danys\MyGithubRepos\fitpath' config user.name 'DanySued'; git -C 'C:\Users\danys\MyGithubRepos\fitpath' add -A; git -C 'C:\Users\danys\MyGithubRepos\fitpath' commit -m 'chore: auto-deploy'; git -C 'C:\Users\danys\MyGithubRepos\fitpath' push origin master }
